title: ilex crenata var. nummularia
intro: Ilex crenata var. nummularia, also known as Japanese Holly, is a variety of the Ilex crenata plant, a species of holly native to Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Ilex crenata var. nummularia can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
